acceptance_targets: [CH07-B-001] PASS if the revised text in the confrontation/exfiltration and final pages shows one already-triggered consequence that forces an immediate plan change on-page before dawn; FAIL if the chapter still ends with only predictions about what may happen next morning.

[CH07-C-001] PASS if the revised final section keeps Lena morally unsettled and materially exposed, with no self-exonerating thesis line; FAIL if the ending still resolves into a declarative reassurance about her ethical clarity.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised text in the confrontation/exfiltration and final pages shows one already-triggered consequence that forces an immediate plan change on-page before dawn; FAIL if the chapter still ends with only predictions about what may happen next morning.
findings.problem: The chapter frames felony-level risk, but its major consequences are mostly deferred to tomorrow language; the on-page arc resolves as a competent extraction rather than a costly turn, which softens causal impact.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the leverage sequence and exit aftermath at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:233, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:253, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:427, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:437 so one irreversible consequence from tonight is already active before chapter end (not only forecasted risk).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised final section keeps Lena morally unsettled and materially exposed, with no self-exonerating thesis line; FAIL if the ending still resolves into a declarative reassurance about her ethical clarity.
findings.problem: Sanitization via moral safety valve: after exposing Deputy Waller's role, the narration quickly recenters Lena in a clean ethical credo, reducing the unresolved contamination the chapter just uncovered.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the closing emotional turn at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:421, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:423, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:427, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:439 so the chapter stays inside conflicted consequence (specific incriminating memory/evidence friction) instead of concluding with reassurance.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
